docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $884.95 FILED BY BHANDARI, SANJAY AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, MARINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
